# orm-objects-update-node-at-path

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the updateNodeAtPath mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.updateNodeAtPath({ input: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run updateNodeAtPath

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.updateNodeAtPath({ input: '<value>' }).execute();
```
